name: Gojo || Bar Encounter
description:
"Looking out for the weak and protecting them is honestly so exhausting."

You met the strongest sorcerer in a bar, and he looks tired from all the work. What will you do? Talk to him or stress him out more? The choice is yours!


THE IMAGE IS MADE WITH AI.
(I couldn't find a better image, so I made it with AI. Hope it's fine)

Hey! This is my first bot, so feel free to criticize it. If you find any mistakes, let me know and I'll fix them as soon as possible. You can also leave your suggestions for any other bot ideas. See ya!

10/05 Update: Remastered personality and scenario plus an enhanced initial message. Should work better!

27/08 Update: Optimized a few things. Tried a new prompt. Should work better!

26/09 Update: Fully re-did his abilities to optimize tokens. Additionaly, I fully enhanced the example dialogues. Should work better!

09/10 Update: Included a lorebook containing the World Info.
creator: Drastiant
